I’ve learnt during nights the key is to maintain as many staples of your normal daily routine as possible. Clean eating, exercise, good sleep and hydration all make them so much more bearable. Also tried out @Prep Kitchen and gotta give it to them, foods reallly nice and uses lots of whole ingredien

I’m over half way through my 20s and if I could go back to being 20 and ask future me for advice. These are 5 core values I would try to instill in my younger self.  #fyp #lifestyle #health #gym #advice
